ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/AI-Engineering-Coach
Language: typescript
better agentic engineering

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [typescript] microsoft/Ontology-Playground
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/Ontology-Playground
Language: typescript
Free, open-source web app for learning about ontologies and Microsoft Fabric IQ. Explore a catalogue of pre-built ontologies, design your own visually, export as RDF/XML, and share interactive diagrams. Zero backend, fully static.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [typescript] oblien/openship
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oblien/openship
Language: typescript
Self-hosted deployment platform

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vercel-labs/deepsec
Language: typescript
Deepsec is a security harness for finding vulnerabilities in your codebase powered by coding agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [ruby] Shopify/ruby-style-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Shopify/ruby-style-guide
Language: ruby
Shopify’s Ruby Style Guide

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [twig] Shoshuo/Prismarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Shoshuo/Prismarr
Language: twig
A self-hosted media dashboard unifying Radarr, Sonarr, Prowlarr, Jellyseerr, qBittorrent and TMDb in a single Symfony 8 interface. One search bar across the local library and TMDb, one calendar merging movie and episode releases, one dashboard, one settings page. Single Docker container, embedded SQLite, multi-arch. AGPL-3.0.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/handy-computer/transcribe.cpp
Language: c++
ggml speech-to-text inference for 16+ model families

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
